title: Block Entity Render Fix
description: Fixes invisible block entitys mostly on bigger servers.
body:
Fixes an issue where block entities (e.g. chests, shulkers, signs, etc.) may become invisible due to rendering glitches.

This mod ensures that all block entities are consistently rendered, preventing them from disappearing or flickering. It improves visual stability without changing gameplay mechanics.

Features:

Prevents invisible block entities
Fixes rendering inconsistencies
Works client-side (no gameplay changes)
Lightweight and performance-friendly

Note:
This is a visual fix only and does not modify how block entities behave internally.
